title: SGLang GitHub closed issues and PRs scheduled crawler supplement manifest, 2026-07-15
scope_note: Daily scheduled crawler Markdown page snapshots for 2026-07-15 after the parent-23 July 10-14 supplement; this is page-level evidence, not a full API corpus refresh with joined comments or PR review comments.

selected_operational_items.title: [Bug] GLM-image /v1/images/generations ignores n > 1 and returns only one image
[Bug] OpenAI image API returns only one URL when `n > 1` and `response_format="url"`

[Bug] Gemma-4 with modelopt_fp4: tuple index out of range
[AMD] [Fix] Fix --attention-backend triton work for DeepSeek MLA on MI355 (null-K + decode dispatch + RoPE)
[Spec] Key DP-attention graph admission on raw sync request counts
[PD] Fix disagg accuracy regression: default early-send cached-prefix off
[Bugfix] Release Mamba cache after PP dynamic chunk profiling
[Disagg][Qwen3.5] Fix heterogeneous attn-TP scatter transfer: GDN conv sub-block slice + GQA replicated-KV head map
[Multimodal] Support n>1 outputs for GLM-Image generation
[AMD] Enable mamba-extra-buffer for Qwen3.5 on ROCm
docs: document CUDA crash dump output
Fix image URL response for multiple outputs
[PP] Fix proxy tensor buffer sizing and refresh for speculative verify

Add cache balance weight for cache-aware routing

Fix SWA pool exhaustion in decode _pre_alloc by passing swa_num_tokens
